name: praxis
description: An on-demand team of SDLC experts for Claude Code — the core six (business analyst, product owner, software architect, developer, QA engineer, DevOps engineer) plus specialists for security, frontend, data, ML/AI, and UX — and a /new-feature orchestrator that runs an idea through the lifecycle, pulling in the specialists a feature warrants. In harness mode a Validation Orchestrator (/validation-orchestrator) gates each step against criteria-checked gates and a typed verify catalog (mandatory G-security, conditional G-performance), and /patterns mines recurring patterns for human-gated promotion. Also ships the skill factory: skill-creator to author your own skills, skill-learner (/learn) to turn knowledge gaps discovered mid-task into durable skills, /validate-skills, and a versioned memory ledger. Use to consult one expert, run a whole feature end to end, or capture and refine team conventions as skills.
